pairs.py:
def range_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return max minus min over reachable node values."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; lo = None; hi = None
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if lo is None or v < lo: lo = v
        if hi is None or v > hi: hi = v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return hi - lo

def sum_positive(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the positive values among reachable nodes."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v if v > 0 else 0
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def count_even_leaves(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes that are leaves (no children) with an even value."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; hits = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) == 0 and vals[n] % 2 == 0: hits += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return hits

def shared_reach_sum(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum values of nodes reachable from both entry points."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]
    first = []
    queue = [spec["a"]]
    while queue:
        n = queue.pop(0)
        if n in first:
            continue
        first.append(n)
        queue.extend(adj[n])
    total = 0
    second = []
    queue = [spec["b"]]
    while queue:
        n = queue.pop(0)
        if n in second:
            continue
        second.append(n)
        queue.extend(adj[n])
        if n in first:
            total += vals[n]
    return total

def child_branch_sums(spec: dict) -> dict:
    """Map each direct child of base to the value sum of its subtree."""
    kids = spec["kids"]
    vals = spec["vals"]
    out = {}
    for ch in sorted(kids.get(spec["base"], [])):
        total = 0
        stack = [ch]
        while stack:
            cur = stack.pop()
            total += vals[cur]
            stack.extend(kids.get(cur, []))
        out[ch] = total
    return out
